➣ **" Secret money fuels last-ditch GOP Senate blitz" **(_Politico_)

[**Can we count on you to rush a gift, Friend? It 'll be QUADRUPLED!**](https://secure.dscc. name: Rachel Wilson
subject: Wow. One Million.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

You won't believe it.

I checked the finance reports today and couldn't believe what I saw. Jim Justice contributed another $1 MILLION to his campaign just over the past few weeks. NPR [reported ](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvpublic.org%2Fpost%2Fbillionaire-gubernatorial-candidate-owes-15-million-taxes-and-fines&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=1)that Jim Justice owes more than $15 million in taxes and unpaid mine safety fines. He doesn't care about anyone but himself; that's why he wrote himself another check to spread more lies and attack ads about Bill Cole.

By not paying his taxes and fines, he's depriving West Virginia communities of much-needed resources. Proving he's only in it for himself and to continue the good ol' boy system that has **_bankrupted_ **West Virginia.

Just like his ally, Hillary Clinton, Jim Justice believes he is above the law.

_**West Virginia** **can't afford****to have a reckless and irresponsible person like Jim Justice as Governor.**_

Our campaign depends on supporters like you to make sure we have the resources necessary to take our message to people across this great state.

Jim Justice is going to use that money to attack and spread lies about Bill Cole. [Help us fight back with a contribution today - $5, $10, $20 even $250 dollars goes a long way. ](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=2)

**We can't do this without you, but together, we can stop Jim Justice.**

[**\--DONATE HERE--**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=3)

Let's fight back against the Justice-Clinton corruption. Anything helps. [Click here](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=4) to make a donation.

Thank you,

Rachel Wilson
Finance Director
[http://www.billcolewv.com/](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=5)

P.S. Don't forget to VOTE! Early voting is going on now.
---
---
| | [](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=6)

[](http://www.billcolewv.com/volunteer?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_mil&n=8)

name: Team Ross
subject: A one-minute read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| We're going to be watching two things all night: **the clock and our fundraising numbers.**

We have until midnight to get to 115 donors in order to open our match program.

**Right now, we 're still short with 3 hours to go.**

Republicans are pouring money into our state with ads for Senator Burr. They are trying to drown us out in the final days of the campaign.

[_**This is how we fight back. We can 't have a weak grassroots push or we'll lose. Help us open our MATCH program. Give $5 or $10.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4278b/2cc31c44/486de0c/19f9b199/1398629554/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161029pm4?refcode=dre161029pm4_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

subject: I'm not just going to sit here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
You deserve better. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439122:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)
I'm putting in another $10 million, Peter -

Hillary Clinton is unloading tons of money given to her by bankers, lobbyists and elites who want her to win, but I am not just going to sit here and let her spread all these vicious lies against me.

_**I AM TRANSFERRING $10 MILLION TO OUR PRESIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN.**_

_*****And I am challenging fed-up patriots like you to join me and fund our final advertising and Get-Out-The-Vote blitz we need to win on November 8th. *****_

[**MAKE A CONTRIBUTION NOW TO THE TRUMP CAMPAIGN $10 MILLION CHALLENGE**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439122:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $250 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439123:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439124:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439125:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439126:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439122:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)**
There is no better time for you to make your first donation to our campaign than right now...

...because right how we are closing the deal with voters who know they deserve better than the disappearing jobs, the open borders, the crushing debt and all the lies and dishonesty from their elected "leaders" in DC.

You deserve better too, Peter. And you will have a government that finally fights for YOU - not the DC elites - after I win. But I need your help.

[**Your contribution of $250, $100, $50, $25, or $5 will power our campaign to victory over Hillary Clinton.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38439122:shAS2uu4N:m:1:876315805:F5CABB44A2784978E07C3C71C7116110:r)

Thank you!

Donald J. Trump

subject: No candidate has ever done this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
You may have seen this news Friday. It’s huge – please read and stand with me so we can WIN. |

Friend, I’ve never done this before. In fact, no candidate in presidential history has ever made this type of commitment. I am putting in $10 million of my own money to close strong and WIN this race. I’m determined to fight for you in Washington. I’m running to serve our country and our people, and I can’t wait to get to work. Help ramp up our Trump Victory campaign for the final week of this historic election – help me WIN huge on November 8th. We’ve set a $20 million Trump Victory Goal, and it is critical to our success. And I know we can blow it out of the water if every one of my supporters helps. Hitting this goal is how we’ll fully fund an aggressive final ad blitz and ramp up our incredible get-out-the-vote program. CONTRIBUTE $100 TO TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTE $75 TO TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTE $50 TO TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTE $35 TO TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT We can’t leave anything to chance, Friend. This race is coming down to the wire, and there is so much on the line. Join millions of other Americans as an official member of Team Trump – we have JUST NINE DAYS TO GO and I need you on board. When we win, I’m going to get to work immediately. I will fight for tax cuts, better trade deals, great jobs and opportunity for our workers, the safety and security of the American people and an end to the corruption in Washington. This is the bold change agenda we need to Make America Great Again. But first I need your help to defeat the Clinton campaign machine. And I know you’ll be so proud when we win. Don’t wait to act – we have less than 48 hours until our fundraising deadline. Thank you! Best wishes, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 TO TRUMP VICTORY GOAL

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Your Voice Has Been Heard!
body:
| Second Encore Performance: Kirk Cameron's Revive US | [View this email in your browser.](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vsZSoxuu-N)
---|---
|

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441063:sZSoxuu-N:m:1:876315805:453E24F41FB4A14812BF07B1718A3BC5:r)

* * *

Dear Peter,

Have you ever wondered what America would look like if Christians united together to change our local communities and our nation? Earlier this year I began to think about that very thing, and Revive US is what was birthed.

What began as a one-night only event, the Lord has turned into a chart-topping multiple night experience. What started as an opportunity for me to try to inspire and encourage my fellow Christians has become one of the most personally inspiring events of my life. I am so blessed and humbled by the nation's support and encouraged that Christians are standing and making their voices heard.

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441064:sZSoxuu-N:m:1:876315805:453E24F41FB4A14812BF07B1718A3BC5:r)

This event is only the beginning of positive change taking place across America, and it's starting by reviving hearts and souls. If you have not attended and been revived, now's the time to go. If you have, then f**orward this message to friends and family** , and include your testimony.

[GET YOUR TICKETS NOW! ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441063:sZSoxuu-N:m:1:876315805:453E24F41FB4A14812BF07B1718A3BC5:r)

**My Faith Votes**
presents
[SECOND ENCORE PERFORMANCE: KIRK CAMERON'S REVIVE US](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441063:sZSoxuu-N:m:1:876315805:453E24F41FB4A14812BF07B1718A3BC5:r)
**Date:** November, 1st
**Location: **Select Theaters Nationwide.
**Time:** Check your local theater.

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95cf/3947388051/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95cf/3947388051/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Voters cast their ballots in just 9 days and recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would lose in NH and hand Senate control (and the future of the Supreme Court!) to Washington Republicans.
The best way to bounce back is to unlock our last match opportunity of the campaign. The deadline is TONIGHT and it looks like you haven't had a chance to help out. [**Please donate $3 or more now -- every dollar you can -- to potentially DOUBLE your impact on Governor Hassan's race, which will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95c8/3947388051/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMwXzEwMjlNYXRjaEV4U3VwUmVjLWtpY2tfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161030_1029MatchExSupRec-kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
This race is neck-and-neck and we don't want to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done just a little bit more, so please, give everything you can right now.
Thanks for stepping up,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Saturday, October 29, at 3:42 PM, MaggieHassan.com
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
We've got 10 days until the election, and I won't sugarcoat it: We need to be doing more to elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.
Recent polls show us down (one has Ayotte up THREE!), and the ONLY way to secure the resources we need to pull ahead is to take advantage of this rare match extension. Here's what I have on record for this email address this weekend:
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH EXTENSION DONATION STATUS:** **[PENDING](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95c8/3947388051/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMwXzEwMjlNYXRjaEV4U3VwUmVjLWtpY2tfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161030_1029MatchExSupRec-kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
**[RECOMMENDED ACTION: DONATE $3 (it could become $6!)](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95c8/3947388051/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMwXzEwMjlNYXRjaEV4U3VwUmVjLWtpY2tfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161030_1029MatchExSupRec-kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
**DEADLINE:** SUNDAY

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95c8/3947388051/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMwXzEwMjlNYXRjaEV4U3VwUmVjLWtpY2tfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161030_1029MatchExSupRec-kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Our race is one of the closest in the country, and Nate Silver says that a voter in New Hampshire is 18 times more likely to determine Senate control than the average American voter. I'm serious when I say that your gift now could be the difference between electing Maggie to the Senate or handing the majority to Washington Republicans.
**[Please, donate $3-- every dollar you can -- before tomorrow's deadline to potentially DOUBLE your impact on our critically important race.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcfa/2a380d31/1741049e/ff95c8/3947388051/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMwXzEwMjlNYXRjaEV4U3VwUmVjLWtpY2tfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161030_1029MatchExSupRec-kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for doing your part,

clean_body: "" "" Voters cast their ballots in just 9 days and recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would lose in NH and hand Senate control (and the future of the Supreme Court!) to Washington Republicans. The best way to bounce back is to unlock our last match opportunity of the campaign. The deadline is TONIGHT and it looks like you haven't had a chance to help out. "" This race is neck-and-neck and we don't want to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done just a little bit more, so please, give everything you can right now. Thanks for stepping up, Team Maggie \-----------Original Message----------- On Saturday, October 29, at 3:42 PM, MaggieHassan.com <info@maggiehassan.com> wrote: We've got 10 days until the election, and I won't sugarcoat it: We need to be doing more to elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court. Recent polls show us down (one has Ayotte up THREE!), and the ONLY way to secure the resources we need to pull ahead is to take advantage of this rare match extension. Here's what I have on record for this email address this weekend: EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com MATCH EXTENSION DONATION STATUS: "" "" DEADLINE: SUNDAY "" Our race is one of the closest in the country, and Nate Silver says that a voter in New Hampshire is 18 times more likely to determine Senate control than the average American voter. I'm serious when I say that your gift now could be the difference between electing Maggie to the Senate or handing the majority to Washington Republicans. "" Thanks for doing your part, Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH ""

subject: Victory is just days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
My father is ready to add $10 million of his own to this urgent effort. |

Friend, It’s incredible -- you can feel the momentum building here at the Campaign HQ in Trump Tower as we get closer and closer to Election Day, now just 9 days away. Everybody here at the campaign is working so hard to reach the voters with my father’s winning message, motivate an unprecedented turnout of Americans, and a win a tremendous victory on November 8th -- but you still have a chance to do your part, too. My father is putting in $10 million of his own funds to the campaign -- and we need to raise $10 million more from Team Trump supporters nationwide before the month is over – so I’m asking for your generous October End of Month Fundraising Drive donation now. Tomorrow night at midnight October is finished -- and we’re running out of time to raise funds which can actually be put to work before Election Day -- so there couldn’t be a better time than right now to add your difference-making support to this historic fight. Friend, to Make America Great Again, we have to make one final great push to make absolutely sure our final advertising and crucial Get-Out-the Vote ground game are as effective as possible -- and your October End of Month gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford will go a long way toward helping us reach our goal. So please don’t hesitate -- it’s time to act for our country, for our freedom and our future -- make your $20 Million October End of Month Fundraising Drive donation now. Sincerely, Donald J Trump, Jr. P.S. Friend, just think how you’ll feel on November 9th after Donald Trump has been declared President-Elect of the United States. Let’s make it happen, Friend -- don’t let this chance to help make history slip away -- step up with your own generous October End of Month contribution of $25 or more today. Thanks again, Donald J. Trump, Jr. CONTRIBUTE $100

body:
NHGOP CALLS ON HASSAN AND SHAHEEN TO RETURN TAINTED THORNTON LAW
FIRM DONATIONS

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:10/30/2013
PRESS CONTACT: Ross Berry, press@nhgop.org

CONCORD- New Hampshire Republican State Committee Chairman,
Jennifer Horn, today called on Governor Maggie Hassan and Senator
Jeanne Shaheen to return tainted donations from the Boston based
Thornton Law Firm after the Boston Globe exposed an illegal straw
donation scheme at the organization. ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyM-2FPW2p3d3iGIo3IbJ5esyf-2BQ-2BYzQTXmCk9cGRViOSSP9gbwT6PCg5vjTQZmIWYb9drDY9kwtvC3KY6fcrTUO1-2FkEI-2F8YFYg8LU7-2Bs8gktUsZXXGla-2BoxFC9NQxmqfwkiI1WfY1-2FVJ-2BhoJwzqASSwzLCricWlWk-2FiFSFgFHbMd-2BZCj9MPVsanhgiiOso5N1Unda9aMCxjMU1I1HJpcM2BEmJK8YhHA7LXsPt68Jfrd-2Bz_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MNOxqmYQp0BuM8BlIg5JgLwJyoeBbc-2BHlJ32G4KJtpLogTv-2BNFNm3ZbPjbYgtZ8YcxHBRhO25jFGtYfsSfy5R7ftLz6WlS-2BBIKbhkNxJxU8R-2F9jrk57MWT-2FH8WGy3rhcRtwtHK-2BvT-2FwImxLnb-2BMKNd5fZgARSV29H779BEIw-2BQby3hsX7KyHM9o94AwZjXRtBxqII-2FjAWPjw331j-2FvU3ekaTnFqxNHfPspFmxua94Y73T8lv7wuvFrDZ2Hd42I-2B4SgYGTPGGKm-2F6BxVGLJG5bDA-3D-3D ) The Center for Responsive Politics and the Washington Free

) report that Hassan accepted $31,000 ( ) from Thornton Law Firm while Shaheen took $27,700 ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyNS6-2F7eoKQ8jATitnUCgJtpx6-2BXeA6q0uUK4bFhA7pQzsrFmHYqdXjQA3t2ZAtJat5LK9Ex1KMyA9HbXs6rNNjOZtKhHU8Lxh482j-2BPTf4n2t8jpeuwUxsjnctj8SQWZNg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MNOxqmYQp0BuM8BlIg5JgLwJyoeBbc-2BHlJ32G4KJtpLogTv-2BNFNm3ZbPjbYgtZ8YcxHBRhO25jFGtYfsSfy5R7cjaJM8Fos2NZYzTS2iJq-2BwYsD6hizOTwnz-2BXxpuY41-2BPTLc9wKy6VmWWl9W79d8-2FiS0CboQnWSBunIpCPLqggX0HpgLwaNZ-2BGzAq1M5T38GktHWkjmLIJElef89TM-2FAsGUbTugY-2FBe1SDf6i6XmFptREa6gipijznqAfplj-2BKureT9doFxaOZyUX0WYKM5vHw-3D-3D ).

“Maggie Hassan has a long history of accepting illegal campaign
contributions that raise serious questions about her political
activity and the integrity of her administration. In addition to
her troubling pattern of illegal campaign contributions, the
Governor has become ensnared in a series of outrageous
pay-to-play ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR7EXnckQCrrDgMzkhYNOlMBs9-2F-2Bcds-2BeeCxgBDCTlSkKjgqXg8YYtx5X4S1zuisu5-2FKe60yUsNySOOu5wVzcoCh_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MNOxqmYQp0BuM8BlIg5JgLwJyoeBbc-2BHlJ32G4KJtpLogTv-2BNFNm3ZbPjbYgtZ8YcxHBRhO25jFGtYfsSfy5R7Z5pqgI4F0Zm1f9ckz7GmoGgcxgzYmcwtyg882NwAimjvHDtUD9G1h7RnrWPWfCm3mNFyjZ7KMBFOG6jWQXw7inG8V-2F719hDcuUX5FgfxoW0O7hWWGKXwYsz07WiicAMbzWcE-2BrSWwlDruK1P5A-2BIQ6cq8vHKIPdITzyYS91dqRuKSMVvow7CdsMuqu8D-2BT2AQ-3D-3D ) schemes that have rewarded her top donors with lucrative state
contracts.”

“Governor Hassan and Senator Shaheen need to immediately return
their tainted donations from the Thornton Law Firm or voters will
continue to have doubts about their judgement and integrity”

“In 2014, Governor Maggie Hassan was ordered by the New Hampshire
Department of Justice ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurliUHWPppvkHgCvnOsOwbuNXcEZdFoi0Y-2FdeqYB4S4StRrVqi-2FarIDdYYm1wdPvkh7vSdZ8xM1oV9ua5oy3wrNg-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MNOxqmYQp0BuM8BlIg5JgLwJyoeBbc-2BHlJ32G4KJtpLogTv-2BNFNm3ZbPjbYgtZ8YcxHBRhO25jFGtYfsSfy5R7Xt9AVBpl5IKYAkyEZ4bnGWa4Eo6h1LtE521n2Tzd1V-2BCR6rdxv-2BZZ1ZlxDYZQT2v5W8A2aAZbI76kmK1DjP2G97RbIsViEJ33BWY4VoMB-2FtHcwkQ2WzR-2FJ6qoGlRaofN72TdUGslQdiQH86ESfH0jt4YHpMjotoN1gmLbghZLGExrbJZe5l-2B8m4fg2XOpWjlg-3D-3D ) to return tens of thousands of dollars from big labor unions
who were attempting to curry favor with her administration”

clean_body: NHGOP CALLS ON HASSAN AND SHAHEEN TO RETURN TAINTED THORNTON LAW FIRM DONATIONS FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:10/30/2013 PRESS CONTACT: Ross Berry, press@nhgop.org CONCORD- New Hampshire Republican State Committee Chairman, Jennifer Horn, today called on Governor Maggie Hassan and Senator Jeanne Shaheen to return tainted donations from the Boston based Thornton Law Firm after the Boston Globe exposed an illegal straw donation scheme at the organization. ( ) The Center for Responsive Politics and the Washington Free Beacon ( ) report that Hassan accepted $31,000 ( ) from Thornton Law Firm while Shaheen took $27,700 ( ). “Maggie Hassan has a long history of accepting illegal campaign contributions that raise serious questions about her political activity and the integrity of her administration. In addition to her troubling pattern of illegal campaign contributions, the Governor has become ensnared in a series of outrageous pay-to-play ( ) schemes that have rewarded her top donors with lucrative state contracts.” “Governor Hassan and Senator Shaheen need to immediately return their tainted donations from the Thornton Law Firm or voters will continue to have doubts about their judgement and integrity” “In 2014, Governor Maggie Hassan was ordered by the New Hampshire Department of Justice ( ) to return tens of thousands of dollars from big labor unions who were attempting to curry favor with her administration” Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. www.nh.gop footer image

name: Greg for Montana Team
subject: Greg for Montana Weekly Recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

GREG FOR MONTANA WEEKLY RECAP

With only 9 days left until Election Day, the RACE IS IN A DEAD
HEAT! Montanans are tired of the poor deal they've gotten from
the current governor and they're ready for a change in Helena.
Lesley and I are ready to roll up our sleeves and get to work for
Montanans. -Greg Gianforte

This week Greg focused on talking
to as many Montanans as possible about his plan to raise
Montana's economy up by creating more jobs and pushing back
against federal regulations. Additionally, multiple stories broke
this week regarding Governor Bullock's shady practices of
deleting state emails, wrongful termination and paying people off
to keep quiet, and Greg believes that Bullock must be held
accountable to Montanans.

NEWS FROM THE WEEK:

Greg delivered a "hard drive
donation bin" to Helena on Saturday to help the Governor save his
emails. Greg called out Governor Bullock for destroying public
record emails while Attorney General, referring to Bullock's
destruction of public records as "even worse than Hillary."

Greg was invited by the Montana
Chamber of Commerce, who have previously endorsed him, to be the
Keynote Speaker at their annual meeting in Billings - an honor
usually reserved for elected officials. Here's an excerpt from
Greg's remarks:
When I look across Montana, I
see potential. We have hardworking, self-reliant people, abundant
natural resources, a growing tech sector and unrivaled natural
beauty. There is no reason why our kids should have to leave the
state to find job opportunities. What we need in this state is
leadership that knows how jobs are created and what businesses
need to succeed. I firmly believe that when we combine good
leadership with hardworking Montanans, the sky is the limit.

Greg was joined on the campaign
trail this week by former Texas governor Rick Perry. Check out
some of the great news coverage from Greg's days with Governor
Perry on MTN News here, the Flathead Beacon and was on the front
page of the Great Falls Tribune.

On Tuesday, Greg held a telephone
townhall meeting with folks from across the state where he
answered questions directly from constituents. During the call,
Greg cleared up a misconception that some voters have about his
tax plan. Click here to listen and learn more:

ENDORSEMENT OF THE WEEK: Judy
Martz, the 22nd governor of Montana

Judy Martz: Why I support
Gianforte, Robinson: Unlike many in our state, Greg refuses to
make excuses for Montana's subpar economic and fiscal situation.
He believes that Montana can do better, and he's proven that in
his business career. With tough times ahead for our economy and
declining state revenues, we need someone with business
experience and a track record of success leading our state.

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

name: Grassroots for Steve
subject: this race is a "toss up"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Thanks to so many of our grassroots supporters, we crushed our last fundraising goal. We've also kept a close two-point lead in a recent public poll -- despite Greg Gianforte's millions.

But a national outlet, _Governing Magazine,_ just moved our race from "Lean Democrat" to "Toss Up," citing Gianforte's huge spending.

We need your help today. [**Pitch in $15.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=q2hVIMGPwR8RjWMnt3tIviHV84OEoeDW)

We always knew this race was going to be extremely close. Greg Gianforte has now topped $5 million in self-funding, he's currently running two different attack ads with made-up, fake headlines and he's flat-out lying about his past positions on outsourcing, stream access and a statewide sales tax.

We can't take anything for granted. **[Please donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uOaC11GPh6tplYFjJ6OyziHV84OEoeDW)**

Thanks,

Grassroots for Steve
************

name: Al Franken
subject: tightening polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I know it's been a long campaign. But right now -- before the last deadline of 2016 -- is when your support matters most... [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- Late in Super Bowl XXVII, a Dallas Cowboys player named Leon Lett picked up a fumble and ran free and clear for a touchdown. But he started celebrating too early, and an opposing player caught up and knocked the ball out of his hands before he got to the end zone.

**Republicans think we 're Leon Lett. And that's why they just dropped $25 million into Senate races across the country.**

See, Republicans see the tightening polls, and they think we're slowing down. And you know what? If they're right, this final blitz of attack ads could turn the tables on this whole election.

[**That 's why meeting our final monthly deadline of the campaign just got even more important - and why I need you to make a triple-matched gift right now!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I know it's been a long campaign. I know you're tired. And I know that football metaphor was kind of strained -- it's been a long campaign for me, too.

But right now is when it matters most. Now, when we're tired. Now, when we're so close to the goal line. Now, when Republicans think we've gotten complacent.

Now is when we need to push harder than ever. Now is when we need to stand up to make Republicans pay the price for their years of obstruction and their support of Donald Trump. Now is when we need to elect a Democratic majority that will fight for the progress we need.

**This is it. The last deadline. Our last chance. Pitch in a triple-matched gift to make sure we meet the last, most important monthly fundraising goal of the entire campaign.**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161030-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks,

"= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Friend -- Late in Super Bowl XXVII, a Dallas Cowboys player named Leon Lett picked up a fumble and ran free and clear for a touchdown. But he started celebrating too early, and an opposing player caught up and knocked the ball out of his hands before he got to the end zone. Republicans think we 're Leon Lett. And that's why they just dropped $25 million into Senate races across the country. See, Republicans see the tightening polls, and they think we're slowing down. And you know what? If they're right, this final blitz of attack ads could turn the tables on this whole election. | Relief and excitement washed over the campaign last night -- and it was all because of this grassroots team.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Don’t hesitate -- now is the time to ACT. |

Friend, Politicians have been saying “This is the most important election ever” for years -- but in 2016, there’s no question about -- the future of freedom and prosperity in America is on the line. And with just 9 days left before Election Day, Donald Trump is once again taking action to make sure every American who wants to make a difference for our country has the best opportunity to do so with our Team Trump $20 Million October End of Month Fundraising Drive challenge today. Mr. Trump knows this unprecedented movement to Make America Great Again will succeed if real Americans -- the grassroots men and women who have had enough of the corruption of politics-as-usual in Washington, DC -- stand up and get the truth to the voters who decide who wins. That’s why he’s announced that he’ll transfer $10 million from his own personal account and we’re challenging patriots like you to help us raise an additional $10 million more for our final October End of Month fundraising push. Contribute $25, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 now and help us crush this goal. Friend, don’t let the desperate, unhinged talking heads in the mainstream media, with their fake assurances of an inevitable Hillary Clinton win, or their wildly inaccurate “over-sampled” polls mislead you. But Crooked Hillary and the unbelievably corrupt Washington establishment/liberal media/Hollywood leftist will go to whatever new lows are necessary to discourage voter turnout and win. Friend, Mr. Trump needs your immediate support to empower our final voter outreach and all-important Get-Out-the-Vote programs to turnout such a massive wave of Trump voters that all Hillary’s tricks will fail. So please take up his challenge -- do your part to match his own commitment with your $20 Million October End of Month drive gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford -- but only until midnight Halloween night. So don’t hesitate -- now is the time to ACT. We can do this -- and we will, if you’ll make an urgent October End of Month contribution today. Sincerely, Katrina Pierson P.S. Friend, please take this final days of the race opportunity to help us finish strong -- right when Team Trump needs it most. Your generous End of Month contribution could be the difference that makes Donald Trump President of the United States on November 8th. Thanks, Katrina CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: Don’t hesitate -- now is the time to ACT. | Friend, Politicians have been saying “This is the most important election ever” for years -- but in 2016, there’s no question about -- the future of freedom and prosperity in America is on the line. And with just 9 days left before Election Day, Donald Trump is once again taking action to make sure every American who wants to make a difference for our country has the best opportunity to do so with our Team Trump $20 Million October End of Month Fundraising Drive challenge today. Mr. Trump knows this unprecedented movement to Make America Great Again will succeed if real Americans -- the grassroots men and women who have had enough of the corruption of politics-as-usual in Washington, DC -- stand up and get the truth to the voters who decide who wins. That’s why he’s announced that he’ll transfer $10 million from his own personal account and we’re challenging patriots like you to help us raise an additional $10 million more for our final October End of Month fundraising push. Contribute $25, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 now and help us crush this goal. Friend, don’t let the desperate, unhinged talking heads in the mainstream media, with their fake assurances of an inevitable Hillary Clinton win, or their wildly inaccurate “over-sampled” polls mislead you. But Crooked Hillary and the unbelievably corrupt Washington establishment/liberal media/Hollywood leftist will go to whatever new lows are necessary to discourage voter turnout and win. Friend, Mr. Trump needs your immediate support to empower our final voter outreach and all-important Get-Out-the-Vote programs to turnout such a massive wave of Trump voters that all Hillary’s tricks will fail. So please take up his challenge -- do your part to match his own commitment with your $20 Million October End of Month drive gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford -- but only until midnight Halloween night. So don’t hesitate -- now is the time to ACT. We can do this -- and we will, if you’ll make an urgent October End of Month contribution today. Sincerely, Katrina Pierson P.S. Friend, please take this final days of the race opportunity to help us finish strong -- right when Team Trump needs it most. Your generous End of Month contribution could be the difference that makes Donald Trump President of the United States on November 8th. Thanks, Katrina CONTRIBUTE $100 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: the decision point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
In just nine days, Marylanders will decide who they want to lead our state and country forward. We know how crucial it is that we all roll up our sleeves and make sure that voters are informed before |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6f/70cdc2ba/473456bc/3978ca0/1048630046/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em103016_1&source=em103016_1") This election is coming to the decision point, friend.

In just nine days, Marylanders will decide who they want to lead our state and country forward. We know how crucial it is that we all roll up our sleeves and make sure that voters are informed before they head to the polls.

Friend, we know what's at stake - the future of the Supreme Court, the fight against climate change, women's access to reproductive health services, a forward looking agenda to create jobs, expand educational opportunity and address growing inequality and so much more.

That's why I'm asking you to stand with us today before the final media buy deadline of this campaign. With 15 percent of the electorate still uncommitted in this Senate election, we are working hard to reach undecided voters with Chris' message and record of results. **[Can you chip now before tomorrow night's media deadline to help us meet this final challenge?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6f/70cdc2ba/473456bc/3978ca1/1048630046/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode= em103016_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+chip+now+before+tomorrow+nightrs&utm_campaign=em103016_1&source=em103016_1")**

We have just days to go - let's finish strong!

Katherine [Donate Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6f/70cdc2ba/473456bc/3978cbe/1048630046/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode= em103016_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+Now&utm_campaign=em103016_1&source=em103016_1")

| | Hi there,

For our campaigns, it all comes down to this moment -- the final sprint.

If we can't give our candidates the resources they need right now, they risk falling behind with no time to catch up.

It's not a pretty picture when a campaign runs out of resources: It means final mail pieces, ad buys, and field staff hires get canceled. And we can't tell campaigns that we'll be in a better position to help them next quarter or even next week -- it's now or never.

I know that this community has never failed to rise to the occasion, and for that I am incredibly grateful. So today, I'm asking you to dig deep -- for flipping the Senate, cleaning up the House, and finally electing the first woman president.

**Donate $3 to help hit our final End-of-Month goal of the 2016 cycle:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Hit-Octobers-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c745d/24c69fd9/97bdc0c/18ed83e0/2513680821/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpHitOctobersG&utm_campaign=WPEFEV82N_digital_email_20161030_NoCuts_n-all&source=WPEFEV82N_digital_email_20161030_NoCuts_n-all")**

Lucinda Guinn

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: Counting down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
There are only 10 days left to Election Day. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc4NDQ2NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjM4Mjc3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Friend, After all the twists and turns of this volatile year, we're closing in on Election Day (finally). **There 's still work to be done, however. The next 10 days are the most critical yet.** Voters in every part of the state are making up their minds. They're weighing Jay's vision and agenda with his opponent's backwards positions. And they're deciding on critical issues up and down the ballot. Look, we know how unpredictable this election has been. And we know that in 2012, well over 50,000 people voted for president but left their choice for governor blank. If that happens again, this election could still change dramatically. **We can 't afford to rest up -- not now, not with so much at stake.** [**Will you donate now to help us raise $20,000 by midnight Monday -- Jay 's last end-of-month deadline -- as we go all out to Election Day?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc4NDQ2NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjM4Mjc3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc4NDQ2NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjM4Mjc3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=OTc4NDQ2NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjM4Mjc3MwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjM4Mjc3MwS2&rt=0)

name: Maggie for NH Polling Team
subject: Aggregated poll data [Match campaign]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdccd/2a380d31/173abe58/ffae3f/938120793/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdccd/2a380d31/173abe58/ffae3f/938120793/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hey folks,
We're in the homestretch of this race, and we're seeing more and more data every day. Wanted to show you some of what the last month looks like:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdccd/2a380d31/173abe58/ffae38/938120793/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI5X01hdGNoRXhQb2xsaW5nVGVhbV9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161029_MatchExPollingTeam_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We're virtually locked in the margin of error in every single recent poll (and even DOWN in some) -- we're keeping an eye on the data, but the absolute best thing we can be doing is talking to more voters.
Right now, a generous group of donors is matching online gifts, but only if we hit our $27,700 goal -- so your gift will go twice as far. **[We know that this race will almost certainly decide Senate control, so we need you to give $3 or more now to help elect Governor Maggie Hassan and take back the Senate for hard-working families.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdccd/2a380d31/173abe58/ffae39/938120793/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaC1leCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI5X01hdGNoRXhQb2xsaW5nVGVhbV9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161029_MatchExPollingTeam_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
There aren't a lot of rock stars in the data field, but one of them is Nate Silver of _FiveThirtyEight_ -- you've probably heard of him. He says that a voter in New Hampshire has over 18 times the impact on the outcome of Senate control than the average American voter. If you're going to be part of any grassroots political campaign,**this is the one that matters most.**
There's no room for error here -- we have to keep watching the numbers and talking to every single voter if we're going to win in 9 days. We have until midnight tonight to hit our goal, and we need you to step up.
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3 (and it could become $6!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161029_MatchExPollingTeam_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25 (and it could become $50!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161029_MatchExPollingTeam_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50 (and it could become $100!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match-ex?refcode=e20161029_MatchExPollingTeam_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**

clean_body: "" "" Hey folks, We're in the homestretch of this race, and we're seeing more and more data every day. Wanted to show you some of what the last month looks like: "" We're virtually locked in the margin of error in every single recent poll (and even DOWN in some) -- we're keeping an eye on the data, but the absolute best thing we can be doing is talking to more voters. Right now, a generous group of donors is matching online gifts, but only if we hit our $27,700 goal -- so your gift will go twice as far. "" There aren't a lot of rock stars in the data field, but one of them is Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight -- you've probably heard of him. He says that a voter in New Hampshire has over 18 times the impact on the outcome of Senate control than the average American voter. If you're going to be part of any grassroots political campaign,this is the one that matters most. There's no room for error here -- we have to keep watching the numbers and talking to every single voter if we're going to win in 9 days. We have until midnight tonight to hit our goal, and we need you to step up. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" -- Maggie for NH Polling Team ""

body:
We have a real opportunity to win the White House and take back the Senate. But with the election just 10 days away, we cannot afford to fall behind in this final stretch! I need your help to remind people who want change in Washington that the change we need is a Democratic Senate--not more gridlock. But we need to act now...
---

subject: Got a free minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Will you stand with my father who will fix this country once he’s elected or are you going to let Hillary steal this election? |

Friend, I need you to stop what you’re doing right now because this cannot wait. Time is running out. Election Day will be here in just 9 days. The future of our country depends on what you do next. Will you stand with my father who will fix this country once he’s elected or are you going to let Hillary steal this election? And because the future of America hangs in the balance, my father is going to add to your donation by putting in $10 million of his own to help fund an urgent TV advertising blitz. Can my father count on your financial support today, Friend? YES COUNT ME IN FOR $35 YES COUNT ME IN FOR $50 YES COUNT ME IN FOR $100 Friend, I hope we can count on you. In fact, we must count on you. Without your support, Hillary Clinton might just win this election and give us another 4 years of the same old liberal policies we have endured for the past 8 years. She’ll give us higher taxes, more government spending, our national debt spiraling out of control, and foreign countries stealing our jobs, our companies, and the investment in our local economies that goes with them moving overseas. We cannot let that happen Friend, but we’re running out of time to fund this ad blitz. I need you to donate $35, $50, or $100 right now to make sure my father gets elected. Sincerely, Eric Trump YES COUNT ME IN FOR $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

| This is the dose of good news we needed.

Despite Republicans $3-million panic spend, _Roll Call_ is still calling North Carolina's Senate race "too close to call." **On top of that, early vote polling reveals that Deborah is ahead of Senator Burr, 61% to 34%.**

Our grassroots push is working. So far, we've been able to keep our momentum up and stay in this race. Now we need to take control of it.

[_**Our TRIPLE MATCH program is open. We 're tripling every dollar that comes in from now until our deadline on the 31st. We can't take any chances. name: Corry Bliss
subject: Countdown to Victory!
body:
| Peter \--

Rob and Jane have been all over Ohio as part of our 80-stop, 4,000 mile "Countdown to Victory" RV Tour. Since last Saturday, they've made stops in Findlay, Springfield, Columbus, Brecksville, Toledo, Dayton, Canton, West Chester, Athens, Terrace Park, Marietta, Uhrichsville, Carrollton, and Akron.

Our campaign is working hard because we know the Senate Majority is at stake. We're knocking on doors, making phone calls, and doing everything we can to win on November 8th. Our incredible grassroots team has contacted more than 5 million voters since May of last year, and we aren't slowing down.

This Senate race presents a clear choice between moving forward with Rob's pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

Early voting is already underway -- [click here to find your polling location](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myohiovote.com&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update1&n=1)! You can also help us with our last minute push by [signing up to volunteer](https://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update1&n=2)!

Thanks for your support. Sincerely,

Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update1&n=3 "Donate here!") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update1&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update1&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update1&n=6). -=-=-

[**Join millions of other Americans as an official member of Team Trump - we have JUST 9 DAYS TO GO and I need you on board!**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzA0LTNiZDVhYTU0NzMyOTRjYjU4NzU1NTI2MTM2ZWRkNGRm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS9vY3RvYmVyLWVuZC1vZi1tb250aC1nb2FsLz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1KRkNfZGlyZWN0LWFza19vY3QtZW9tJmFkZGl0aW9uYWxbdXRtX2NvbnRlbnRdPUNDLUxZLTEwMzAxNi1vY3QtZW9tLWdvYWwtdXBkYXRlLWRqdC10cGctamZjLXBzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cF9DQ19MWQ&K=9ij5bPUSpNHbn91BdjQ2yw)

When we win, I'm going to get to work immediately. I will fight for tax cuts, better trade deals, great jobs and opportunity for our workers, the safety and security of the American people and an end to the corruption in Washington.

**This is the bold change agenda we need to Make America Great Again!**

But first I need your help to defeat the Clinton campaign machine. And I know you'll be so proud when we win. I want you to be part of an historic victory for the American people next Tuesday.

[**Don 't wait to act - we have less than 48 hours until our fundraising deadline! Join Team Trump with your most generous possible contribution.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzA0LTNiZDVhYTU0NzMyOTRjYjU4NzU1NTI2MTM2ZWRkNGRm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS9vY3RvYmVyLWVuZC1vZi1tb250aC1nb2FsLz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1KRkNfZGlyZWN0LWFza19vY3QtZW9tJmFkZGl0aW9uYWxbdXRtX2NvbnRlbnRdPUNDLUxZLTEwMzAxNi1vY3QtZW9tLWdvYWwtdXBkYXRlLWRqdC10cGctamZjLXBzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cF9DQ19MWQ&K=QFTbLK483XPbehxLwaJagA)

Thank you - I hope to have you standing with me!

Best wishes,

Donald J. Trump

name: Official Van Hollen Campaign
subject: following up for Chris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
We cannot afford to take anything for granted - after all, just two years ago, Maryland elected a Republican governor. Did you see this email? Monday marks our final media buy deadline before Election Day. We cannot afford to take anything for granted - after all, just two years ago, Maryland elected a Republican governor in the biggest upset election in the country.

[**If you 're standing with us, please chip in to our October Media Buy Fund now to ensure that we keep this seat Blue and send Chris Van Hollen to the Senate to fight for us.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6d/70cdc2ba/4734f2a4/3978bb9/2954382915/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em103016&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+If+yoursquore+standing+with+us+please+ch&utm_campaign=em103016_02&source=em103016_02")

Begin Forwarded Message:
>
> |
> [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6d/70cdc2ba/4734f2a4/3978bb6/2954382915/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em103016&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em103016_02&source=em103016_02") Friend,
>
> No election in our lifetime has been as disruptive and unpredictable as this 2016 election. We need a strong vote to ensure we keep this Maryland Senate seat Blue, win a Democratic Senate majority and elect Hillary Clinton to be our next President.
>
> We also need to trounce Trumpism so that it cannot rise from the ashes to undermine the ability of our government to function for the next four years.
>
> There are just 10 days left in this campaign, and it's our duty to ensure that Maryland voters across our state make it to the polls during Early Voting or on Election Day to help move our state and country forward.
>
> Fifteen percent of voters are still undecided in this Senate race. **[Friend, will you help us get over the finish line strong?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6d/70cdc2ba/4734f2a4/3978bb7/2954382915/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em103016&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Friend+will+you+help+us+get+over+the+fin&utm_campaign=em103016_02&source=em103016_02")**
>
> Many thanks,
>
> Chris [ Chip in Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6d/70cdc2ba/4734f2a4/3978bb4/2954382915/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode= em103016&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+FIRSTNAME+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=em103016_02&source=em103016_02")
> ---
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b6d/70cdc2ba/4734f2a4/3978bb5/2954382915/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em103016_02&source=em103016_02") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. body:

But we need your help to make sure voters know that John's the best choice too. **We still need to raise $15,248 by tomorrow at midnight to fully fund our get-out-the-vote plan. We have nine days left to mount the biggest field campaign Indiana has ever seen.

| We're down in the single digits. And I don't only mean in the polls.

**We only have 9 days left in this campaign.** We have to do absolutely everything we can to win -- air TV ads, knock on doors, make phone calls, and get as many voters as we can to the polls.

We're up against a lot of spending. Rubio and his right-wing supporters seem to have an endless amount of shady cash to spend against us. **But we can still win with your help.**

[_**The team tells me that we 're still $53,019 away from our $150,000 goal and we only have 24 hours left. Our match program is still activated. So I'm asking you personally -- give what you can, whatever amount that is, before it's too late.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6d/738133e4/3236b876/7f8588f1/2029150557/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161030pm2?refcode=pme161030pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

Thanks,

Patrick |
